column1: Backwards-compatible Codex 5.5 agentic runtime layer built on the PROMEON 3.7 ontology workbook.

column3: Adds explicit operating constitution, diagnostic workflow, primitive activation, anti-pattern suppression, system state modeling, and validation tests.
Existing ontology, edge, evidence, case, diagnostic, prompt, and deployment sheets are preserved.
System_Prompt_v4, System_Prompt_Package_v4, Diagnostic_Workflow_v4, Reasoning_Primitives_v4, Anti_Patterns_v4, System_State_Model_v4, Validation_Tests_v4, PROMEON_4_0_Readme.
The workbook remains the editable reasoning spine; 4.0 strengthens how the agent must reason over the graph.
